pushoverAppToken.label: Pushover Application Token
pushoverAppToken.help: Your Pushover application API token. Create one at pushover.net/apps/build

pushoverUserKey.label: Pushover User Key
pushoverUserKey.help: Your Pushover user key. Found on your dashboard at pushover.net/dashboard

pushoverGroupKey.label: Pushover Group Key
pushoverGroupKey.help: Optional delivery group key to broadcast notifications to multiple users. Create groups at pushover.net/apps/groups
